reference.title: Tailwind CSS Product Features - Official Tailwind UI Components

feedback: Plus / UI Blocks / Ecommerce / Components / Product Features
Tailwind의 product feature 예시 이름과 개수를 맞춘 상품 설명 변형입니다.
Product feature sections pair tactile imagery with concise details so shoppers can understand materials, use cases, and care before comparing options.
